title: Ginger Ray White and Silver Scratch To Reveal Unique Wedding Invitations 10 Pack
features: Reveal the date with Scratch The Date Wedding Evening Invitations
description: Product Description Invite your friends and family to your Wedding Reception in a unique way with these gorgeous Scratch to Reveal Wedding Reception Invitations. The stunning crisp white designed invites come complete with silver scratch stickers!Each invite has blank space for you to personalise with key information such as: names location and RSVP. Use the blank circles to fill in your wedding date and simply stick the stunning silver scratch stickers over the top! Your loved ones will have endless fun scratching the silver stickers to reveal the date of your big day!Each pack contains 10 invitations 10 envelopes and 30 scratch stickers. Invites measure: 10cm (W) x 15cm (H). Safety Warning No Warning
